summary: Completed testing of Admin User Management - Edit, Delete, Delete All functionality. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified with edit dialog, delete confirmation, and delete all confirmation working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id} edits user name successfully
Backend: PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id} edits user phone successfully
Backend: PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id} edits user email successfully
Backend: PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id} edits user business_name successfully
Backend: PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id} edits user position successfully
Backend: PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id} edits multiple fields at once
Backend: PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id} rejects duplicate phone numbers (400)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id} returns 404 for non-existent user
Backend: PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id} returns 400 for empty update body
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/users/{user_id} deletes user successfully
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/users/{user_id} cascades to event registrations
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/users/{user_id} returns 404 for non-existent user
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/users endpoint exists and is accessible
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/users clears registrations (verified via individual delete)
Backend: All endpoints require authentication (401/403 without token)
Frontend: Users page shows Edit (pencil) and Delete (trash) action buttons per row
Frontend: Edit button opens dialog with pre-filled user fields (name, phone, email, position, business, category, subcategory)
Frontend: Save Changes in edit dialog updates user and shows 'User updated' toast
Frontend: Delete button shows browser confirmation prompt
Frontend: 'Delete All' button visible with user count (502)
Frontend: Delete All shows confirmation dialog requiring 'DELETE ALL' text input
Frontend: Delete All button disabled until correct text entered
Frontend: Delete All dialog lists cascading deletions (registrations, captains, seating, attendance, references, WA messages)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements verified, edit/delete flows working)

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test user (phone: 9999888877) during frontend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: User management edit/delete features fully implemented. Key endpoints: PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id} for edit, DELETE /api/admin/users/{user_id} for single delete, DELETE /api/admin/users for delete all. Frontend uses dialogs for edit and delete all confirmation. Delete single user uses browser confirm(). Edit dialog pre-fills all user fields including category/subcategory dropdowns. Delete all requires typing 'DELETE ALL' to enable button. Cascade deletions include: event_registrations, table_captains, attendance, references, whatsapp_messages, and pulls from table_assignments user_ids arrays.
